who: accountants at small law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month
offer: For accountants at small law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month, manual reconciliation causes late filings and compliance issues. We simplify reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: manual reconciliation processes are time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accountants seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accountants with a demo video
Participate in community forums for accountants sharing tools
try_it: Let users test template-based reconciliation reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
